name: Pork Spareribs with Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Pork spareribs, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly brown the pork spareribs in a hot skillet.
2. Add oil, potatoes, onion, and sherry to the skillet.
3. Cook for 5 to 10 minutes or until the potatoes and onions are lightly browned.
4. Mix in oyster sauce, soy sauce, and sugar.
5. Simmer for 20 to 30 minutes.
